entry.title: New: RES25-304 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL, LODGING, MEALS, AND RELATED EXPENSES VALUED AT $2,080.98 TO THE CITY FROM ABUNDANCE NETWORK EDUCATION FOR COUNCILMEMBER TYLER DOS SANTOS-TAM TO PARTICIPATE IN THE ABUNDANT ELECTED FELLOWSHIP PROGRAM’S IN-PERSON TRAINING WEEKEND IN TEMPE, ARIZONA.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
